title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
summary: OpenAI计划收购Ona，以扩展Codex功能，提供安全、持久的云端环境，支持企业工作流中的长期运行AI代理。
analysis_note: 收购扩展Codex至企业级AI代理，技术方向明确，但细节有限，评分中等偏上。
